description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci/gh-actions/depends that runs on every push and pull request, excluding changes to docs and README.md. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a container, and set up a matrix strategy to build and test the project across multiple toolchains and platforms, including RISCV 64bit, ARM v7, ARM v8, i686 Linux, Win64, x86_64 Linux, Cross-Mac x86_64, Cross-Mac aarch64, x86_64 Freebsd, ARMv7 Android, and ARMv8 Android. Install dependencies, set up Rust 1.69, configure git, and use ccache and depends caches. Prepare the environment for specific toolchains, and build and upload artifacts.
